advancement.vanilla_hammers.root.title: Ọtụrụ Vanilla
advancement.vanilla_hammers.prismarine_h: Ụzọ Ọzọ Maka Ndụ N'ime Mmiri
advancement.vanilla_hammers.root.descrip: Kedu maka ngwá ọrụ ịkụ n'ọnọdụ ya?
advancement.vanilla_hammers.stone_hammer: Bido na ihe ndị bụ isi ma mepụta mma nkume.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.slime_hammer: Mepụta mma slime... gịnị ma ị gbaa ihe na ya?
advancement.vanilla_hammers.lapis_hammer: Ọ bụ mma diamond, ọ bụghị mma Lapis!
advancement.vanilla_hammers.prismarine_h: Mepụta mma Prismarine site n'ihe nke osimiri.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.quartz_hamme: Malite mmeri ọkụ gị na Mma Quartz.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.golden_hamme: Ọkpọ ọlaedo anaghị arụ ọrụ nke ọma, ma ọ dị ezigbo mma!
advancement.vanilla_hammers.netherite_ha: Mepụta mma Netherite, a kụrụ ya na nkume ọla edo oge ochie sitere n'oge amaghị ama.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.emerald_hamm: Gosi ịdị iche gị site na Mma Ndọda.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.fiery_hammer: Mee ka ịda gị kwụsịrị site na Ọkpọkọ Ọkụ.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.obsidian_ham: Mepụta ngwá ọrụ ọla obsidian ma gawa ịkụ ọla ruo awa iri na asaa na-enweghị nkwụsị.
advancement.vanilla_hammers.ender_hammer: Mepụta Ender Hammer ka ị kwụsị nsogbu ịgba ala gị.
